title: Debugging login redirect test failure
body:
Started debugging the failing Login page integration test. The test 'should redirect to dashboard after submit' times out with no redirect. 

Examined the test output: the form submission fires but the page stays on /login. Checked the Login component source. Noticed that AuthRedirect is not imported. The handleSubmit function should call a redirect utility from AuthRedirect after successful authentication, but the import is missing, so the redirect never occurs. This is consistent with the test expectation. Next step: add import { AuthRedirect } from '../auth-redirect'; and call AuthRedirect.redirectTo('/dashboard') in the submit handler.

title: Weekly sprint planning notes
body: Discussed upcoming tasks: finalize auth redirect refactor, update login test suite, and prepare release notes. Decision: Alex will handle the refactor and test fixes by end of week.

title: Code review feedback on auth-redirect module
body: Reviewed the AuthRedirect module. It provides a simple redirect function that uses window.location.href. The module is fine; no changes needed. Ensure all components that need redirecting import it.
